# daytona_sandbox_traces (Data Source)

Reads bounded OpenTelemetry trace summaries for a Daytona sandbox.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "daytona_sandbox_traces" "example" {
  sandbox_id = "sandbox-id"
  from       = "2026-01-02T03:04:05Z"
  to         = "2026-01-02T04:04:05Z"
  limit      = 50
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `from` (String) Start of the time range as an RFC3339 timestamp.
- `sandbox_id` (String) Daytona sandbox ID.
- `to` (String) End of the time range as an RFC3339 timestamp.

### Optional

- `limit` (Number) Maximum number of trace summaries to return. Defaults to 100.
- `page` (Number) Page number to request. Defaults to 1.
- `request_organization_id` (String) Daytona organization ID to send as `X-Daytona-Organization-ID`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Data source identifier.
- `items` (Attributes List) Returned trace summaries. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--items))
- `total` (Number) Total matching traces.
- `total_pages` (Number) Total result pages.

<a id="nestedatt--items"></a>
### Nested Schema for `items`

Read-Only:

- `duration_ms` (Number) Trace duration in milliseconds.
- `end_time` (String) Trace end timestamp.
- `root_span_name` (String) Root span name.
- `span_count` (Number) Number of spans in the trace.
- `start_time` (String) Trace start timestamp.
- `status_code` (String) Trace status code, when available.
- `trace_id` (String) Trace ID.
